{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Abyssal Palace Herald
| aliases = Herald of Abyssal Palace
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Abyssal Palace Herald]] hurls chunks of mountains at [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald]] of [[Abyssal Palace]] arrived after the Blood, Silent, and Storm [[Sages]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
